---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill's procedure or triggering
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What workflow or open source scenario is not handled well today?

## Proposed change

What should the skill do differently? If it affects triggering, list example
prompts that *should* and *should not* activate it.

## Boundaries check

Does this require touching source code or anything outside docs/metadata? If so,
explain why it should still respect the skill's hard boundaries.

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you tried or thought about.
